Subscribe to Sorcery on YouTube for more conversations with the people shaping AI and join the free newsletter. You can also do paid at sorcery.vc for weekly insights on AI, robotics, enterprise software, consumer, semiconductors, did I say AI? AI again, and everything that's coming next like funding announcements and all big things in tech. Thank you. Bye.
